derived_rules.name: card_payment
derived_rules.source_text: Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200.

derived_rules.name: payment_method
derived_rules.source_text: Connect Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces. Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components. Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more. Grow revenue by monetising payments. Stripe handles pricing for your users Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.25% starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction. See pricing details

derived_rules.name: custom_pricing
derived_rules.source_text: Standard Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing. No setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden fees. Request an invite 2% for cards issued in India 3% for cards issued outside India Custom Design a custom package – available for businesses with large payments volume or unique business models. Volume discounts Multi-product discounts Country-specific rates Standard pricing Custom pricing FAQs

derived_rules.name: three_d_secure
derived_rules.source_text: Features available out of the box: Global access 195 countries Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries. 135+ currencies Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion. 100+ payment methods From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods. 1 integration Accept payments globally through a single integration. Built-in fraud prevention Powerful machine learning Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies. Adapts to new fraud patterns Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning. No integration required Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection. Fraud analytics Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting. Tools to optimise your checkout Flexible UI components Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site. Pre-built payment forms Embed a pre-built payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page. Accelerated checkout Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience. No-code payments Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Payments optimisations to boost revenue Real-time retries Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning. Auto-updated cards Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue. Customer authentication Verify a customer’s identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method for card transactions Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces Seamless onboarding Onboard and verify users with conversion-optimised UIs. Platform management Manage payment operations with tools for your platform and your users. Embedded components Embed and white label payment workflows for your users. Risk tools Access tools to help you mitigate risk for your connected accounts. Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts Flexible payout options Opt to receive transfers on a rolling basis, weekly, or monthly. Like-for-like settlement In selected regions, get paid out in your preferred currencies. Payout transparency See upcoming payouts, expected deposit dates, payout history, and more in the Dashboard. Phone, chat, and email support 24x7 support Our team is here to help over email, phone, or chat. You can even get email support in 6 languages. Industry-leading documentation Build using our robust technical docs. Sample code in 8+ languages. Technical support on Discord Chat to our technical team on the official Stripe Developer Discord server. Security, reliability and compliance 99.999% average historical uptime Maximise your revenue with a platform that handles 250 million+ API requests a day, while maintaining 99.999% uptime. PCI compliant Use our libraries to collect payment information without sensitive data ever hitting your servers. Regulatory licences globally Stripe is certified to the highest industry standards and has obtained regulatory licences around the world.

derived_rules.name: custom_pricing
derived_rules.source_text: Standard pricing for all products Explore pricing for the full Stripe platform Online and in-person payments, recurring billing, embedded payments, and much more. Global payments Payments Radar Money management Connect Revenue and finance automation Billing Invoicing More Atlas Workflows Custom pricing Global payments Optimise checkout conversion, accept local payment methods, and increase acceptance rates. Payments An online payments platform engineered for growth. Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods. Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout. Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations. Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Payment optimisations Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Authorisation Boost Increase acceptance rates and reduce card processing costs with AI-powered payment optimisations, inclusive of Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Individual pricing available for Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.2% per successful online card transaction for accounts with custom payments pricing More features Adaptive Pricing Present prices in local currencies to your customers, tailoring customer experience and increasing revenue. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Customers will be presented a conversion fee starting at 2% Radar AI-powered fraud and abuse protection. Reduce fraud across payment methods with AI powered by the Stripe network. Flag and prevent suspicious accounts from joining your platform. Stay ahead of emerging fraud and stop abuse across the entire customer lifecycle. Get started with zero integration, or access Radar’s intelligence via API. Radar’s machine learning Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network. Included For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing ₹4.00 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Radar for Fraud Teams Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. Try for free for 30 days ₹6.00 per screened transaction for accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing Contact us Dispute prevention Help reduce dispute rates with dispute prevention tools powered by Verifi from Visa and Ethoca from Mastercard. derived_rules.name: custom_pricing
derived_rules.source_text: Radar AI-powered fraud and abuse protection. Reduce fraud across payment methods with AI powered by the Stripe network. Flag and prevent suspicious accounts from joining your platform. Stay ahead of emerging fraud and stop abuse across the entire customer lifecycle. Get started with zero integration, or access Radar’s intelligence via API. Radar’s machine learning Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network. Included For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing ₹4.00 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Radar for Fraud Teams Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. Try for free for 30 days ₹6.00 per screened transaction for accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing Contact us Dispute prevention Help reduce dispute rates with dispute prevention tools powered by Verifi from Visa and Ethoca from Mastercard. Included Dispute deflection lookups ₹1,000.00 per Visa resolution ₹1,000.00 per Visa Compelling Evidence 3.0 block ₹2,000.00 per Mastercard resolution Compare plans

derived_rules.name: payment_method
derived_rules.source_text: Money management Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing. Connect Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces. Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components. Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more. Grow revenue by monetising payments. Stripe handles pricing for your users Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.25% starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction. See pricing details

Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing.
Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing.

Features available out of the box: Global access 195 countries Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries. 135+ currencies Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion. 100+ payment methods From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods. 1 integration Accept payments globally through a single integration. Built-in fraud prevention Powerful machine learning Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies. Adapts to new fraud patterns Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning. No integration required Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection. Fraud analytics Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting. Tools to optimise your checkout Flexible UI components Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site. Pre-built payment forms Embed a pre-built payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page. Accelerated checkout Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience. No-code payments Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Payments optimisations to boost revenue Real-time retries Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning. Auto-updated cards Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue. Customer authentication Verify a customer’s identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method for card transactions Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces Seamless onboarding Onboard and verify users with conversion-optimised UIs. Platform management Manage payment operations with tools for your platform and your users. Embedded components Embed and white label payment workflows for your users. Risk tools Access tools to help you mitigate risk for your connected accounts. Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts Flexible payout options Opt to receive transfers on a rolling basis, weekly, or monthly. Like-for-like settlement In selected regions, get paid out in your preferred currencies. Payout transparency See upcoming payouts, expected deposit dates, payout history, and more in the Dashboard. Phone, chat, and email support 24x7 support Our team is here to help over email, phone, or chat. You can even get email support in 6 languages. Industry-leading documentation Build using our robust technical docs. Sample code in 8+ languages. Technical support on Discord Chat to our technical team on the official Stripe Developer Discord server. Security, reliability and compliance 99.999% average historical uptime Maximise your revenue with a platform that handles 250 million+ API requests a day, while maintaining 99.999% uptime. PCI compliant Use our libraries to collect payment information without sensitive data ever hitting your servers. Regulatory licences globally Stripe is certified to the highest industry standards and has obtained regulatory licences around the world.

Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Global payments Payments Radar Money management Connect Revenue and finance automation Billing Invoicing More Atlas Workflows Custom pricing Global payments Optimise checkout conversion, accept local payment methods, and increase acceptance rates. Payments An online payments platform engineered for growth. Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods. Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout. Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations. Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Payment optimisations Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Authorisation Boost Increase acceptance rates and reduce card processing costs with AI-powered payment optimisations, inclusive of Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Individual pricing available for Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.2% per successful online card transaction for accounts with custom payments pricing More features Adaptive Pricing Present prices in local currencies to your customers, tailoring customer experience and increasing revenue. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Customers will be presented a conversion fee starting at 2% Radar AI-powered fraud and abuse protection. Reduce fraud across payment methods with AI powered by the Stripe network. Flag and prevent suspicious accounts from joining your platform. Stay ahead of emerging fraud and stop abuse across the entire customer lifecycle. Get started with zero integration, or access Radar’s intelligence via API. Radar’s machine learning Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network. Included For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing ₹4.00 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Radar for Fraud Teams Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. Try for free for 30 days ₹6.00 per screened transaction for accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing Contact us Dispute prevention Help reduce dispute rates with dispute prevention tools powered by Verifi from Visa and Ethoca from Mastercard. Included Dispute deflection lookups ₹1,000.00 per Visa resolution ₹1,000.00 per Visa Compelling Evidence 3.0 block ₹2,000.00 per Mastercard resolution Compare plans Money management Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing. Connect Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces. Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components. Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more. Grow revenue by monetising payments. Stripe handles pricing for your users Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.25% starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction. See pricing details Revenue and finance automation Streamline critical business processes with modular billing, tax, revenue reporting, and data analysis tools that work seamlessly together. Billing Subscription management software for recurring revenue models² and one-time billing. Respond to user demand faster with flexible pricing models. Increase revenue and reduce churn with Smart Retries and recovery workflow automations. Save engineering time with no-code tools or our composable APIs. Access to Billing Start billing for recurring subscriptions & usage based billing. 0.7% of Billing volume Includes Billing transactions processed on and off Stripe. Excludes one-off invoices. See pricing details Invoicing Global invoicing software. Create, customise, and send an invoice in minutes – no code required. Save time with automated accounts receivable and invoicing workflows. Configure invoices for any use case. Starter Invoicing features to get started quickly. 0.4% per paid invoice See pricing details More Atlas Software to quickly incorporate your startup. File your incorporation paperwork in minutes. Use documents trusted by law firms, tax attorneys, and venture capital investors. Get over $50K in discounts and perks. Incorporate your company Incorporate your company, get your EIN, issue equity, and file your 83(b) tax election. US$500.00 one-off setup fee (includes government fees and your first year of registered agent services) See pricing details Workflows Automate tasks and create custom flows, without writing code. Automate business processes with 600+ event triggers. Eliminate boilerplate code with visual workflow builder. Extend Stripe capabilities by connecting third-party applications. Monitor and debug with built-in logging and versioning. Pay as you go No commitment, no recurring fees. Start building workflows today. Included 10,000 steps per month ₹1.64 per additional step Navigate to: Global payments Money management Revenue and finance automation More Global payments Payments Radar Money management Connect Revenue and finance automation Billing Invoicing More Atlas Workflows

Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Radar AI-powered fraud and abuse protection. Reduce fraud across payment methods with AI powered by the Stripe network. Flag and prevent suspicious accounts from joining your platform. Stay ahead of emerging fraud and stop abuse across the entire customer lifecycle. Get started with zero integration, or access Radar’s intelligence via API. Radar’s machine learning Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network. Included For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing ₹4.00 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Radar for Fraud Teams Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. FAQs How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . entries.source_evidence:
How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

entries.source_evidence:
How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

sections.heading: Revenue

sections.body:
Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing.
Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing.
Connect Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces. Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components. Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more. Grow revenue by monetising payments. Stripe handles pricing for your users Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.25% starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction. See pricing details

Features available out of the box: Global access 195 countries Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries. 135+ currencies Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion. 100+ payment methods From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods. 1 integration Accept payments globally through a single integration. Built-in fraud prevention Powerful machine learning Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies. Adapts to new fraud patterns Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning. No integration required Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection. Fraud analytics Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting. Tools to optimise your checkout Flexible UI components Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site. Pre-built payment forms Embed a pre-built payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page. Accelerated checkout Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience. No-code payments Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Payments optimisations to boost revenue Real-time retries Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning. Auto-updated cards Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue. Customer authentication Verify a customer’s identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method for card transactions Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces Seamless onboarding Onboard and verify users with conversion-optimised UIs. Platform management Manage payment operations with tools for your platform and your users. Embedded components Embed and white label payment workflows for your users. Risk tools Access tools to help you mitigate risk for your connected accounts. Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts Flexible payout options Opt to receive transfers on a rolling basis, weekly, or monthly. Like-for-like settlement In selected regions, get paid out in your preferred currencies. Payout transparency See upcoming payouts, expected deposit dates, payout history, and more in the Dashboard. Phone, chat, and email support 24x7 support Our team is here to help over email, phone, or chat. You can even get email support in 6 languages. Industry-leading documentation Build using our robust technical docs. Sample code in 8+ languages. Technical support on Discord Chat to our technical team on the official Stripe Developer Discord server. Security, reliability and compliance 99.999% average historical uptime Maximise your revenue with a platform that handles 250 million+ API requests a day, while maintaining 99.999% uptime. PCI compliant Use our libraries to collect payment information without sensitive data ever hitting your servers. Regulatory licences globally Stripe is certified to the highest industry standards and has obtained regulatory licences around the world.

Standard pricing for all products Explore pricing for the full Stripe platform Online and in-person payments, recurring billing, embedded payments, and much more. Global payments Payments Radar Money management Connect Revenue and finance automation Billing Invoicing More Atlas Workflows Custom pricing Global payments Optimise checkout conversion, accept local payment methods, and increase acceptance rates. Payments An online payments platform engineered for growth. Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods. Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout. Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations. Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Payment optimisations Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Authorisation Boost Increase acceptance rates and reduce card processing costs with AI-powered payment optimisations, inclusive of Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Individual pricing available for Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.2% per successful online card transaction for accounts with custom payments pricing More features Adaptive Pricing Present prices in local currencies to your customers, tailoring customer experience and increasing revenue. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Customers will be presented a conversion fee starting at 2% Radar AI-powered fraud and abuse protection. Reduce fraud across payment methods with AI powered by the Stripe network. Flag and prevent suspicious accounts from joining your platform. FAQs How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. sections.body:
How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe.

sections.heading: FAQs

sections.body:
How are payment fees calculated?
How are payment fees calculated?
Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method .
Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method .

Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more

Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe.

unclassified_entries.fee_category: Features available out of the box:
unclassified_entries.product: Features available out of the box:
section_path: Features available out of the box:
unclassified_entries.source_evidence:
Global access 195 countries Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries. 135+ currencies Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion. 100+ payment methods From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods. 1 integration Accept payments globally through a single integration. Built-in fraud prevention Powerful machine learning Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies. Adapts to new fraud patterns Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning. No integration required Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection. Fraud analytics Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting. Tools to optimise your checkout Flexible UI components Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site. Pre-built payment forms Embed a pre-built payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page. Accelerated checkout Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience. No-code payments Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Payments optimisations to boost revenue Real-time retries Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning. Auto-updated cards Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue. Customer authentication Verify a customer’s identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method for card transactions Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces Seamless onboarding Onboard and verify users with conversion-optimised UIs. Standard pricing for all products Explore pricing for the full Stripe platform Online and in-person payments, recurring billing, embedded payments, and much more. Global payments Payments Radar Money management Connect Revenue and finance automation Billing Invoicing More Atlas Workflows Custom pricing Global payments Optimise checkout conversion, accept local payment methods, and increase acceptance rates. Payments An online payments platform engineered for growth. Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods. Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout. Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations. Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. Domestic cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued domestically. about our different card types. 2% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued in India* Domestic debit card transactions have the Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) of 0.4% capped to ₹200. International cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards, prepaid cards, and digital wallets for cards issued internationally. 3% for Mastercard and Visa cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 3.5% for American Express cards issued outside India + 2% if currency conversion is required 4.3% for international cards with USD or other currency presentment + 2% if currency conversion is required Disputes Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes. Smart Disputes Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. to learn more. Dispute received fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you receive. In rare cases, network fees also apply. Dispute countered fee ₹1,000.00 for each dispute you respond to manually. You can also add your own evidence. ( public preview ) Smart Disputes fee 30% of the disputed amount for each dispute you win. There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. FAQs How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

See our customers From startups to Fortune 500s, explore how millions of businesses use Stripe to start and scale their companies. Explore the docs Start building your integration and accept your first payment in minutes. Stripe libraries are available in every language from Ruby to Go. Read the docs ¹ Stripe Radar for Fraud teams and Stripe Connect with platform-controlled pricing are priced separately. ² Basic usage-based billing features will continue to be available via Stripe's Meters API as part of Billing pricing.

classification_evidence: no clear numeric fee or unrecognized category
unclassified_entries.source_evidence:
How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe.

Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing, or contact us to design a custom package specifically for your business. unclassified_entries.source_evidence:
How are payment fees calculated? Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method . Will I be charged tax? Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates. Read more Are there additional fees for refunds? For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used . For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned. For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe. Do you have setup fees or monthly fees? Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website. Do you offer any discounts? Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.
